query:
INSERT INTO position_funding (position_id, funding_type, funding_percentage, budget_amount, notes) VALUES
(1, 'grant_funded', 100.00, 45000, 'Funded by workforce development grant'),
(2, 'mixed', 60.00, 55000, '60% grant funded, 40% revenue funded'),
(3, 'grant_funded', 100.00, 42000, 'Funded by education grant'),
(4, 'revenue_funded', 100.00, 65000, 'Funded by Academy tuition revenue'),
(5, 'grant_funded', 100.00, 48000, 'Funded by community health grant'),
(6, 'mixed', 50.00, 52000, '50% grant funded, 50% donation funded'),
(7, 'revenue_funded', 100.00, 45000, 'Funded by business services revenue'),
(8, 'grant_funded', 100.00, 60000, 'Funded by financial literacy grant');
